name: TEST - Total Amount Not Equal to Line Sum + Tax + Charges (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.amount_total)
  and not is_empty(field.amount_total_tax_calculated)
  and not is_empty(field.charges_calculated)
  and round(field.amount_total, 2) != round(
    sum([default_to(v, 0) for v in field.item_total_base.all_values])
    + field.amount_total_tax_calculated
    + field.charges_calculated,
    2
  )
)

payload.content: Total Amount on the header is not equal to the sum of Line Total Net on line items + Tax Amount + Charges.
Total Amount on the header is not equal to the sum of Line Total Net on line items + Tax Amount + Charges.
